purpose: Provide rotational support with axial and radial load capacity while maintaining precise positioning and smooth operation

outputs.name: vibration_velocity
outputs.description: Bearing vibration velocity indicating dynamic condition

outputs.name: vibration_acceleration
outputs.description: Bearing vibration acceleration indicating impact and roughness

outputs.name: lubrication_film
outputs.description: Effective lubrication film thickness per bearing

states.name: grease_degradation
states.description: Grease condition degradation driven by temperature and contamination

states.name: bearing_surface_wear
states.description: Bearing surface degradation from water and dust contamination

states.name: cage_wear
states.description: Cage material degradation from wear and friction

states.name: ball_surface_damage
states.description: Ball surface degradation from electrical discharge

events.name: excessive_temperature
events.description: High temperature generation due to inadequate sealing or excessive preload

events.name: cage_noise
events.description: Friction between ball surface and cage guide surface in cold conditions

events.name: grease_leakage
events.description: Loss of lubrication due to grease escaping from bearing

events.name: contamination_ingress
events.description: Water, dust, or coolant entering bearing causing degradation

parameters.name: grease_life_hours
parameters.description: Expected grease service life under normal conditions

parameters.name: surface_wear_life_hours
parameters.description: Expected bearing surface life under normal conditions

parameters.name: cage_life_hours
parameters.description: Expected cage service life under normal conditions

parameters.name: ball_surface_life_hours
parameters.description: Expected ball surface life under normal electrical conditions

parameters.name: surface_wear_rate
parameters.description: Rate multiplier for surface wear degradation

parameters.name: cage_wear_rate
parameters.description: Rate multiplier for cage wear degradation

parameters.name: electrical_discharge_rate
parameters.description: Rate multiplier for electrical discharge damage

parameters.name: baseline_vibration_velocity
parameters.description: Baseline vibration velocity for healthy bearing

parameters.name: baseline_vibration_acceleration
parameters.description: Baseline vibration acceleration for healthy bearing

parameters.name: excessive_temperature_threshold
parameters.description: Grease degradation threshold for temperature warning

parameters.name: cage_noise_threshold
parameters.description: Cage wear threshold for noise warning

parameters.name: grease_leakage_threshold
parameters.description: Grease degradation threshold for leakage maintenance

parameters.name: contamination_threshold
parameters.description: Surface wear threshold for contamination failure

state_transition_logic: grease_degradation decreases by (grease_degradation_rate / grease_life_hours) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
bearing_surface_wear decreases by (surface_wear_rate / surface_wear_life_hours) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
cage_wear decreases by (cage_wear_rate / cage_life_hours) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
ball_surface_damage decreases by (electrical_discharge_rate / ball_surface_life_hours) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
output_logic: vibration_velocity = baseline_vibration_velocity * (2.0 - min(grease_degradation, bearing_surface_wear, cage_wear)) * (1.0 + 5.0 * (1.0 - ball_surface_damage))
assumptions: All degradation mechanisms progress independently and monotonically
Vibration increases as bearing condition deteriorates
Grease degradation is the primary driver of lubrication film reduction
Electrical discharge primarily affects ball surfaces rather than races
Contamination primarily affects bearing surfaces through abrasive wear
Temperature effects are captured through grease degradation acceleration
Cage wear manifests primarily as increased noise and vibration
